requirement_topic.en: TCRA Type Approval — Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: TCRA型式批准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: TCRA型式批准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain a TCRA type approval certificate from the Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority before importation or sale in Tanzania, under the Electronic and Postal Communications Act (EPOCA) 2010 and the Electronic and Postal Communications (Radio Frequency Spectrum Management) Regulations. The TCRA Equipment Approval Scheme (EAS) requires the applicant to submit test reports from accredited laboratories and a technical file. CE marking, FCC authorisation, and CCC certification are not recognised as equivalents by TCRA. EAC harmonisation is underway but wireless device type approval remains nationally enforced via TCRA. The TCRA approval mark with approval number must be displayed on the product and packaging before customs clearance.
summary.zh: 所有无线电发射机及电信终端设备须依据《电子和邮政通信法》（EPOCA）2010年及《电子和邮政通信（无线电频率频谱管理）条例》，在进口或于坦桑尼亚销售前取得坦桑尼亚通信监管局（TCRA）颁发的型式批准证书。TCRA设备审批方案（EAS）要求申请人提交来自认可实验室的测试报告及技术档案。CE标志、FCC授权和CCC认证均不被TCRA视为等同认可。东非共同体协调正在推进，但无线设备型式批准仍由TCRA在全国层面执行。产品及包装在海关清关前须显示含批准编号的TCRA批准标志。
summary.zht: 所有無線電發射機及電信終端設備須依據《電子和郵政通訊法》（EPOCA）2010年及《電子和郵政通訊（無線電頻率頻譜管理）條例》，在進口或於坦尚尼亞銷售前取得坦尚尼亞通訊監管局（TCRA）頒發的型式批准證書。TCRA設備審批方案（EAS）要求申請人提交來自認可實驗室的測試報告及技術檔案。CE標誌、FCC授權和CCC認證均不被TCRA視為等同認可。東非共同體協調正在推進，但無線設備型式批准仍由TCRA在全國層面執行。產品及包裝在海關清關前須顯示含批准編號的TCRA批准標誌。

standards_or_laws: Electronic and Postal Communications (Radio Frequency Spectrum Management) Regulations (Tanzania)

summary.en: China MIIT SRRC radio type approval for radio frequency equipment; MIIT network access licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment; CCC certification for RF equipment within CCC scope. GB standards (e.g. GB 9254, GB 17625 for EMC; GB 4943 for safety) apply domestically. SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are China-domestic only and carry no legal standing with the Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority.
summary.zh: 中国工信部SRRC无线电型式批准适用于射频设备；工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）适用于电信终端设备；CCC认证适用于CCC范围内的射频设备。GB标准（如GB 9254、GB 17625电磁兼容；GB 4943安全）在境内适用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准仅限于中国境内，在坦桑尼亚通信监管局（TCRA）不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 中國工信部SRRC無線電型式批准適用於射頻設備；工信部電信終端設備進網許可證（NAL）適用於電信終端設備；CCC認證適用於CCC範圍內的射頻設備。GB標準（如GB 9254、GB 17625電磁相容；GB 4943安全）在境內適用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准僅限於中國境內，在坦尚尼亞通訊監管局（TCRA）不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — RF equipment in scope (China)

gap.en: Mandatory separate TCRA type approval certificate required from the Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority under EPOCA 2010. CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not accepted. SRRC and NAL have no legal standing in Tanzania. EAC harmonisation does not yet remove the TCRA national type approval requirement for wireless devices. The TCRA approval mark with approval number must be displayed on the product and packaging before customs clearance.
gap.zh: 须依据《电子和邮政通信法》（EPOCA）2010年另行取得坦桑尼亚通信监管局（TCRA）颁发的强制性型式批准证书。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被接受。SRRC和NAL在坦桑尼亚不具法律效力。东非共同体协调尚未取消无线设备的TCRA国家型式批准要求。产品及包装在海关清关前须显示含批准编号的TCRA批准标志。
gap.zht: 須依據《電子和郵政通訊法》（EPOCA）2010年另行取得坦尚尼亞通訊監管局（TCRA）頒發的強制性型式批准證書。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被接受。SRRC和NAL在坦尚尼亞不具法律效力。東非共同體協調尚未取消無線設備的TCRA國家型式批准要求。產品及包裝在海關清關前須顯示含批准編號的TCRA批准標誌。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TCRA type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported or sold in Tanzania under EPOCA 2010. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by TCRA. CE and FCC authorisations are likewise not accepted. A separate TCRA Equipment Approval Scheme (EAS) process must be completed and the TCRA approval mark with approval number displayed on the product and packaging before customs clearance. EAC harmonisation does not currently waive this national requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《电子和邮政通信法》（EPOCA）2010年，TCRA型式批准对于所有在坦桑尼亚进口或销售的无线电及电信终端设备均属强制要求。中国SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被TCRA承认，CE和FCC授权同样不被接受。须完成独立的TCRA设备审批方案（EAS）程序，并在海关清关前于产品及包装上显示含批准编号的TCRA批准标志。东非共同体协调目前不免除该国家要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《電子和郵政通訊法》（EPOCA）2010年，TCRA型式批准對於所有在坦尚尼亞進口或銷售的無線電及電信終端設備均屬強制要求。中國SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被TCRA承認，CE和FCC授權同樣不被接受。須完成獨立的TCRA設備審批方案（EAS）程序，並在海關清關前於產品及包裝上顯示含批准編號的TCRA批准標誌。東非共同體協調目前不免除該國家要求。
